data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for pausing/canceling lifecycle and grace windows.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement regarding pausing/canceling lifecycle and grace windows. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or reads that directly address this requirement. The prior steps focus on various aspects of the booking and resource management processes, but there is no specific evidence related to the lifecycle management or grace windows, indicating a lack of necessary evidence to confirm whether the requirement is satisfied or not.
gaps: No evidence of pausing/canceling lifecycle and grace windows.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the pausing/canceling lifecycle and grace windows.
